biome_zones.name: Cretaceous Jungle Core
biome_zones.description: Dense tropical jungle — primary dino habitat. T-Rex territory.

biome_zones.name: Cretaceous Savanna
biome_zones.description: Open plains with scattered cycads. Herbivore grazing grounds.

biome_zones.name: Volcanic Highlands
biome_zones.description: Rocky volcanic terrain with steam vents. Dangerous predator zone.

biome_zones.name: River Delta Wetlands
biome_zones.description: Wetland area with shallow water. Amphibious dino territory.

notes: Sphere domos removed this cycle. Dinos spawned with correct SKM paths. Next cycle: create UE5 Landscape with height variation replacing flat plane terrain.
